attacking_style: Not an attacker. Durbridge is a time trial specialist and team worker who excels in individual TT stages, particularly when starting early in the running order.
team_tactics: Functions as high-level domestique in team time trials, delivering the squad to strong finishes. Not positioned for personal glory in road stages.
terrain_preference: Time trial stages, especially prologue/early TTs where he can set benchmarks. Flat, power-based efforts suit his diesel engine and TTT skills.
vulnerability: Mountain stages and selective terrain where pure climbing watts matter. Role limits personal ambitions in stage races beyond TT days.
key_patterns: Early starter in time trials who sets competitive benchmarks before favorites roll (2 observations)
Team time trial specialist holding high individual positions through pacing excellence (2 observations)
Consistent top-six TT finisher even with 50+ second deficits to pure specialists
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 TT performance showed maintained quality as domestique/TT worker, but limited recent data for trend analysis
